meta.sourceOfTruth: Competitors are named ONLY where the repo cites them (esytol/docs/*SEO.md, *BusinessImpact.md, IncomeTaxBusinessCase.md). content/comparisons.ts deliberately names NO brands.
meta.measurementCaveat: All comparative MEASURED metrics (competitor traffic, DA/DR, rankings, revenue, CWV) are UNKNOWN — not discoverable from the repo and not fetched. Never invented. Fields set null. Verification is a backlog task.

features.esytol: single-purpose, deterministic, privacy-first (client-side, no login), full amortization/schedules, CSV export, methodology + reviewer cited
features.esytolAdvantage: no signup, no tracking, transparent methodology
features.esytolGap: no brand-specific landing variants, no app, no email capture

seo.esytol: strong uniform on-page schema (SoftwareApplication/FAQ/Breadcrumb), 31 supporting articles, INR schema
seo.competitorGap: competitors have far higher domain authority + backlinks (UNKNOWN, not measured)

content.esytol: 31 articles (finance/retirement), 7 route comparisons, methodology per tool
content.competitorGap: competitors publish larger content libraries + videos; Esytol has ZERO video/tutorial content

monetization.esytol: none live (privacy-first; AdSense stub disabled; affiliate fields empty by guard test)
monetization.competitors: lead-gen, product cross-sell, ads, affiliate, paid advisory
monetization.esytolChoice: deliberately unmonetized to date (STRATEGY-005: ₹0 validated revenue)

finance.brandKeywordNote: Esytol tool keywords already target brand queries (e.g., 'sbi fd calculator','hdfc home loan emi calculator') — see registry keywords. Dedicated brand-variant landing pages are a content/SEO opportunity (backlog).

competitors.name: ClearTax (compliance suite)
competitors.type: full filing/compliance suite (not a lean API)

competitors.name: income-tax-india-e-filing (RapidAPI, deprecated)
competitors.type: prior RapidAPI incumbent — gap in market

features.esytol: public REST API — Old vs New regime, §-level trace, OpenAPI 3.1, health/ready/version, AY 2024-27
features.competitorGap: Sandbox/ClearTax cover full compliance/filing; Esytol covers calculation only (resident individuals <60; excludes capital gains, firms)
features.opportunity: a lean, cheap, well-documented calculation API is a positioned gap (deprecated RapidAPI incumbent)

monetization.esytol: unpriced public seam (lib/api/auth.ts) — no keys/metering today
monetization.opportunity: RapidAPI free+paid tiers (the recorded REVENUE-SPRINT-001 decision)

distribution.competitorGap: marketplace presence (RapidAPI) supplies billing+buyers; Esytol not yet listed

everyday.note: repo does not name everyday-tool competitors; developer-tool competitors (jsonformatter.org, jwt.io, etc.) are NOT cited in the repo — left UNKNOWN rather than invented.
